ogTitle: Wetheron vs Weyba Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wetheron and Weyba Downs.
heading: Wetheron vs Weyba Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wetheron, Queensland and Weyba Downs, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wetheron has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Weyba Downs (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wetheron or Weyba Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wetheron has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Weyba Downs scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wetheron scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Weyba Downs scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wetheron or Weyba Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wetheron has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
